features: Durable Gift Box: Our cardboard boxes are made of high-quality 350gsm kraft paper (thickness 0.42mm),which is more sturdy and durable. These regular gift boxes with lids can be reused and recycled,with perfect size and shape,suitable for various small gift packaging

Size and Quantity: You will receive 24pcs gift boxes,20M hemp rope and 24pcs small tags,the box size is L7 x W7 x H3cm(2.7x2.7x1.2inch),just the right size to pop little items in,adequate quantities for gift sharing. When they arrive they will be flatpacked. Note: Please double check the size before purchasing

Recyclable Boxes: Each gift box in this set is 100% recyclable. They arrive flat-packed for convenient storage until you need one. They are easy to assemble. It is advised not to use these boxes for posting

Personalize Presents: You can decorate these boxes to be as beautiful as the present inside. ou can write on the surface of the plain box and add ribbons, bows, twine, wrapping paper, stickers, stamps and even your own artwork to fit the party or gifting theme.Personalized gifts are sure to bring surprises to your family or friends

Wide Application:Since these boxes are blank, they can be decorated how you like, which makes them perfect for any celebration, festivals or occasion. Prfect for home made truffles, handmade soap, sweets, cookie, candy, chocolate, earring, secret Santa joke
description: YankMooM Brown Kraft Gift Boxes (Pack of 24) Give your gifts in kraft packaging for any occasion. You can decorate each small boxes so that it becomes as pretty as the gift it contains Description: 1.The gift box is suitable for candy and DIY crafts,and can store various accessories,cereals,snacks,etc 2.The gift box can be assembled in a few seconds,and immediately spend DIY time with your family 3.The gift box complements your high-end party and makes your party look outstanding 4.You can also use them as table decorations and thank you gifts Specification: Material: 350Gsm Cardboard Color: Brown Size: 7*7*3cm/2.7*2.7* 1.2inch Quantity: 24Pack Package Includes: 24 x Brown Cardboard Gift Boxes Flat Packed 1 Roll * Hemp Rope 24 x Small Tags
